Be very very careful on any decision to break a certainbusiness property.
Think about the COST and BENEFIT very thouroghly!!!
THINK TWICE from all perspectives before you ACT ONCE!!!

On some cases or actions, the negative impact may be much bigger than the benefit it brings!!

There can be misalignment of what OTHERS perceive about the reasons behind your ACTIONS. If that happens, will misalignment defeats the purpose?

HK people should buy in or at least accept your actions. Right??
** unless you do NOT need their support **

Again, your biggest enemy is YOURSELF. do NOT let emotions get to you!!
